src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Refactor RedisServer to extend AbstractRedisInstance to share common lifecycle logic.
Add Lombok dependency to enable annotation-based logging and boilerplate reduction.
Integrate SLF4J logging via Lombok to track server initialization arguments.
Remove Guava dependency by eliminating usage of Strings and Files utilities.
Update the ready-state detection regex to be more robust across Redis versions.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: private static final String REDIS_READY_PATTERN = ".*(R|r)eady to accept connections.*";

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Simplify constructors to delegate argument building to a shared builder or parent class.
Remove the inner Builder class and manual process management logic in favor of the new abstraction.
Remove the RedisRunScriptEnum and OS detection logic, likely moved to the parent class or utility.
Remove manual stream reading and process waiting logic, delegated to AbstractRedisInstance.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Capture the boolean return value of File.setExecutable to handle potential permission failures gracefully.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: boolean ret = command.setExecutable(true); if (ret) { return command; } else { return null; }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reformat code indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces to align with project style.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: Changed leading whitespace from 4 spaces to 2 spaces for all lines in the method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group standard library imports before third-party imports.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: Moved java.io imports above com.google.common and org.apache.commons imports.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support modern testing standards.
Introduce Lombok @Slf4j annotation to simplify logging setup in the test class.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency to utilize RandomUtils for port generation.
Add Google Guava dependency to utilize Resources for accessing test resources.
Replace hardcoded port 6379 with random port allocation to prevent port conflicts during parallel test execution.
Introduce a @BeforeEach method to initialize common test state like host and port.
Replace JUnit 4 @Test(timeout=...) with JUnit 5 @Timeout annotation for cleaner syntax.
Replace JUnit 4 @Test(expected=...) with JUnit 5 Assertions.assertThrows for more precise exception testing.
Add test case to verify custom Redis executable provider configuration.
Add test case to verify failure handling when a bad executable path is provided.
Add test case to verify the Redis server ready pattern matching logic against sample output.
Remove Jedis client dependency from tests as it is no longer used in the updated test suite.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler properties to target Java 11.
Add Jedis client dependency for Redis communication.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 utility library.
Add Apache Commons Collections4 utility library.
Add Google Guava utility library.
Add Google Gson JSON library.
Add Lombok for boilerplate reduction.
Add Apache Commons IO utility library.
Add Apache Commons BeanUtils library.
Add Apache Commons Codec library.
Add Apache Commons Compress library.
Add Hutool utility library.
Add JUnit Jupiter for modern testing.
Add Mockito for mocking in tests.
Add Awaitility for asynchronous testing.
Add Awaitility Proxy for testing support.
Add SLF4J Simple binding for logging.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage.
Add Maven Site plugin.
Add Maven Release plugin.
Add Maven Compiler plugin.
Add Maven Source plugin.
Add Maven Surefire plugin for test execution.
Add Maven Checkstyle plugin.
Add Maven Javadoc plugin.
Add Nexus Staging plugin for deployment.
Add Maven GPG plugin for signing artifacts.
Add Spotless plugin for code formatting.
Update project groupId, version, and repository URLs to reflect new ownership.
Update developer information and SCM connections.
Configure distribution management for Sonatype Nexus.

README.md.general_idea: Update the Maven dependency snippet to reflect the new groupId (org.signal) and version (0.8.0) for the forked library.
Add a section explaining that this is a fork of embedded-redis updated to Redis 6.0.5 to support recent features.

Fork Notes
==============
This repository is a fork of https://github.com/ozimov/embedded-redis...

README.md.general_idea: Modernize usage examples to use the new fluent API with RedisExecProvider and add Java syntax highlighting.
Add documentation and code examples for the new Redis Cluster support with Sentinels and master-slave replication.
README.md.human_impl:
## Setting up a cluster

Our Embedded Redis has support for HA Redis clusters with Sentinels and master-slave replication

- Redis 6.0.5 for macOS (amd64)
